title: Independently randomly determined amount sets respectively associated with sets of symbol display positions
abstract: Gaming systems and methods that relate that independently randomly determine and display sets of awards respectively associated with sets of symbol display positions for multiple plays of a game.
claims: 1. A gaming system comprising: a housing comprising an access door; a security monitoring circuit supported by the housing, that monitors the access door, and that causes a signal to be sent to a remote server when the access door is opened; a power distribution component supported by the housing; a plurality of output devices comprising a display device supported by the housing, and a speaker supported by the housing; a sound card supported by the housing and operable with the speaker; a plurality of input devices comprising a touch screen input device supported by the housing and operable with the display device; a processor supported by the housing; and a trusted memory device supported by the housing and configured to provide a gaming regulatory authority a root trusted authority that can be tracked and verified as original, the trusted memory device storing instructions, wherein the plurality of instructions, when executed by the processor, during a play of a game, cause the processor to: cause a display, by the display device, of a plurality of symbol display elements associated with a plurality of symbol display position sets; cause a display, by the display device, of a plurality of separate amount sets respectively associated with the plurality of symbol display position sets, each amount set comprising a plurality of randomly determined amounts; and responsive to an occurrence of a triggering event during the play of the game: cause a display, by the display device, of a plurality of randomly determined symbols of the symbol display elements at the plurality of symbol display position sets, and for each symbol display position set, responsive to an occurrence of an amount collection event associated with that symbol display position set: randomly determine a quantity of the amounts of the amount set associated with that symbol display position set to indicate, and determine which amounts of that amount set to indicate based on that quantity, the quantity being at least one, cause a display, by the display device, of an indication of each determined amount of that amount set, cause a display, by the display device, of a removal of each determined amount of that amount set, for each determined amount of that amount set, randomly determine a replacement amount for that amount set, and cause a display, by the display device, of each replacement amount in that amount set.
